title: Fanilla+
description: Minecraft Vanilla, but improved with better graphics, more FPS and convenient tools - creating the ultimate version of Minecraft!
body:
Want to play Vanilla Minecraft but with more performance, use shaders or (technical) tools, but not ruin the Vanilla experience? Then this is it. This modpack contains serveral setup versions for everyone. It aims to give you all the tools, fps and pretty shaders you may need. Have fun with shaders and high fps on almost any machine and enjoy some enhanced vanilla tools. No mods will change your vanilla experience and most of them are multiplayer friendly.

The pack is strongly oriented along a vanilla friendly smp. Thus the modding remains rather slim and more focused on optimizing game performance and experience.

In addition every pack will include several Resource- and Datapacks. They won't affect the game majorly but have minor improvements and additions for the game like mob heads for all mobs. As they are always optinal we added them to every version you choose to download so dont worry about it! 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Disclaimer

While it is possible to play on every Minecraft Server with this, it is not recommended. There are some mods (like Freecam and Litematica) that are not allowed or not really wanted. Use them to your own risk. 
Contents of this modpack are not created by us. We choose several of them to provide an easy installation and nice collection of them. Some Datapcks you add are from Vanilla Tweaks and not done by ourselves. You can find them here: [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
All Mods are "as-is" installations from Modrinth and currently do not contain any further adjustments or settings. We recommend you continusly copy your config file to keep the changes to settings you've made in your installtion.
The Logo of this Modpack is AI-generated with Microsoft Copilot.
